mentions.note: CEO Patti Poppe: data centers reduce electricity costs in California; every gigawatt reduces rates 1%+ due to scale economics.

Lowered residential rates 23% while hardening grid and capturing data center demand surge (4.5 GW final engineering, 10+ GW pre-application). On track for 5th consecutive year double-digit earnings growth. Stock undervalued due to wildfire liability uncertainty; deserves $25 target.
